project.title: Mi hermana me ahogó. Desperté el día de mi boda. - Parte 5 (final)
project.subtitle: La lectura
project.hook: A las diez leían el testamento. La silla de mi abuelo seguía vacía.
project.motor: N_regresion — cobro / desgracia transferida al traidor

luto.prompt: Same character Da-eun, same face and very long black hair tied back, plain black high-neck mourning dress, the small pearl hairpin holding her hair, standing upright, both hands empty, calm unreadable expression, neutral studio background.

ahogada_tina.prompt: Same character Mi-rae, same face, same emerald green silk dress soaked through, her shoulder-length hair floating wet around her face, lying back submerged to the collarbone in a white marble bathtub, both arms loose under the water, her eyes wide open and awake, no wounds, no blood, neutral studio background.

ingredients.generation_prompt: Single antique pearl hairpin, thin silver stem with three small cream pearls, slightly worn, neutral dark background, extreme detail, realistic photography, no text, no logo.

Single traditional Korean personal name seal, a short cylinder of dark red stone with a carved base, lying beside a small round tin of red seal ink with the ink surface freshly pressed and glossy, no readable text, neutral dark background, extreme detail, realistic photography, no logo.

Single thick cream envelope sealed with a disc of dark red wax pressed with a carved seal, lying in a brass letter tray, no readable text, neutral dark background, extreme detail, realistic photography, no logo.

Single small cheap notebook lying open, cream ruled pages densely covered in handwritten ink columns of dates, no readable text, the paper slightly warped, neutral dark background, extreme detail, realistic photography, no logo.

Single thin medical file folder lying open on a dark surface, printed forms with faint ruled boxes and a doctor's handwritten note, a small clinic stamp in one corner, no readable text, neutral background, extreme detail, realistic photography, no logo.
